who: procurement supervisors in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 purchase orders/week
offer: For procurement supervisors in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/week, frequent changes cause confusion and potential errors. We aggregate purchase order changes and email change logs instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Frequent changes to purchase orders lead to confusion and potential errors in procurement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement supervisors
Indie Hackers posts about procurement workflows
DM outreach to procurement supervisors with demo video
Community forums where procurement supervisors share tools
try_it: Let users try weekly email summaries of purchase order changes
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video for manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Provide default reminder schedule presets for users
Enable CSV import for existing purchase order data
Allow one-click export of simple change reports
Streamline steps in the onboarding process
